MakeCharacterDefault.Name: Use compact sheet as the default character sheet
MakeCharacterDefault.Hint: When enabled, player characters open with the compact sheet by default. Reload after changing this setting.

MakeAdversaryDefault.Name: Use compact sheet as the default adversary sheet
MakeAdversaryDefault.Hint: When enabled, adversary actors open with the compact sheet by default. Reload after changing this setting.

MakeEnvironmentDefault.Name: Use compact sheet as the default environment sheet
MakeEnvironmentDefault.Hint: When enabled, environment actors open with the compact sheet by default. Reload after changing this setting.

ShowAdversaryInteractionButtons.Name: Show interaction buttons on compact adversary and environment sheets
ShowAdversaryInteractionButtons.Hint: When enabled, compact adversary and environment sheets show attack, chat, item action, resource, and similar interaction controls.

ShowAdversaryResourceBlock.Name: Show a separate HP and stress block on compact adversary sheets
ShowAdversaryResourceBlock.Hint: When enabled, compact adversary sheets show HP, stress, and damage thresholds in a separate footer block. When disabled, the footer is hidden and those values move into the header summary.
